title: Roasted Uruguayan Courgettes Bake
description: A kid-friendly Uruguayan dish featuring roasted courgettes, slow-cooked to perfection, suitable for kosher diets. This flaky bake is great for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Trim the ends of the courgettes and cut them into 1-inch slices.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the sliced onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Sprinkle the sliced courgettes with salt and pepper. Add the courgettes to the skillet and cook until slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the courgettes to a baking dish. Sprinkle the flour over the top.
Add the grated cheese over the flour. Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for another 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
